expectations.evidence: Uses inventory__list_hosts, correctly per multi-step-workflows disambiguation table
Uses limit=20 instead of per_page. The MCP schema uses per_page (not limit) and page (not offset) for inventory pagination. Old skill v1.2 documents limit/offset which are the wrong parameter names.
Discusses showing first 20 with '...and N more' suffix, and showing all if ≤20
Plans table with Display Name, OS, Last Check-in columns
Does not mention flagging systems with stale check-ins
